'''Lora Nadad''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] in service to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the decades leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] born to a family on [[Forard]], Lora Nadad was orphaned at a young age and eventually became the de facto leader among those orphans of "[[The Lost (children)|The Lost]]" living in the city. At the age of nineteen, Nadad was identified as Forceful and inducted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to be [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the experimental [[Almas Academy|Academy]] on [[Almas]], far from the eyes of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="AOE" />

While there, Nadad befriended fellow apprentice [[Alurali]], and the two worked together to promote the welfare of ''The Lost''.<ref name="TL" /> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Nadad invoked the [[Right of Denial]] and refused to report to Coruscant to receive military ranking within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Near the end of the war, a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] named [[Garth Ezzar]] [[Destruction of the Almas Academy|attacked and destroyed]] the academy in a stunning assault upon Almas. Surviving the attack, Nadad fled to a [[Jax Warehouse|warehouse]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]] where she was able to avoid detection as the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] was initiated at the end of the war by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="EndTimes: The Eye">{{LivingForce|EndTimes: The Eye}}</ref>
